mediaSelector.title: Media Asset
mediaSelector.uploadInstructions: Drag & drop or click to browse files (MP3, WAV, MP4, WebM...)
mediaSelector.uploadInstructionsActive: Drag & drop files or click to add (Max 1 video background, multiple audios)

lyricsInput.title: Lyrics
lyricsInput.tip: Enter lyrics normally. Spaces automatically split words, enabling word-by-word sync by pressing Space.
lyricsInput.confirmReset: Are you sure you want to clear all sync data and reset everything?

syncPanel.uploadRequired: Please upload an audio or video file to activate the Sync Engine.
syncPanel.syncCompleteDetail: You can listen to the preview, export subtitles, or refine time tags in the timeline.
syncPanel.syncInstructions: Activate Sync Mode and tap the Spacebar along with the music.

project.invalidJson: The JSON file structure is invalid for EasyKara.
project.readError: Could not read the JSON project file.

export.notReadyWarning: Please sync at least one word to enable export!

videoExport.title: Export to Video File (.webm)
videoExport.desc: Record the live karaoke canvas and merge it with the source audio to download a video directly from your browser!

timeline.syllableDesc: Align lyric syllables with audio peaks
timeline.helpInstructions: Drag syllable blocks to align | Drag track blocks to adjust audio offsets. Use Mute/Solo.
timeline.helpZoom: Zoom in (+ / -) for micro-adjustments. Playhead snapping active.
